title: TooMany Teacup! [cobblemon]
description: This addon add a sinistea of every type base on various drinks!
body:
There are thousand of drinks in the world why would there only be one species of **sinistea**? This addon will add a new form of sinistea base on various kinds of drink! inspire by https://www.instagram.com/eef.here/ (i already ask him for permission) 

As of now there are : 

**Siniztea & Enrgeist** you can found siniztea in badland and it can be evolve into Enrgeist by level 40 while holding a thunder stone!
